name: kopo
title: Kopo
description: Rephrase the selected text with Claude or ChatGPT (via Raycast Pro)
author: ioseb

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: Provider
preferences.description: Which API to use for rephrasing

preferences.name: anthropicModel
preferences.title: Anthropic Model
preferences.description: Model ID for the Anthropic provider

preferences.name: openaiModel
preferences.title: OpenAI Model
preferences.description: Model ID for the OpenAI provider

commands.name: kopo
commands.title: Kopo
commands.description: Rephrase selected text and paste it back

commands.name: kopo-modal
commands.title: Kopo (Modal)
commands.description: Rephrase selected text and show it in a modal

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
